question: Will CPI rise more than 1.1% in March 2026?
reasoning: The March 2026 CPI report has already been released by the BLS on April 10, 2026. The data shows CPI increased 0.3% in March on a seasonally adjusted basis, which is significantly below the 1.1% threshold required for YES resolution. Since the actual result is known and definitively below 1.1%, the true probability is 0%.
key_factors: Official March 2026 CPI data released showing 0.3% increase
Market closes tomorrow but result already determined
risks: None - the outcome is already determined by official government data
